details.name: Test 6 - Regression Validation
details.regression_result: Next version installed successfully on Arm64
details.comparison: Current pinned New Relic version 1.63.0 passed smoke tests in this run. Regression validation downloaded and extracted the candidate Arm64 artifact from https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/releases/download/1.72.9/newrelic-infra_linux_1.72.9_arm64.tar.gz successfully, the candidate bundle resolved to executable Arm64 binaries, and the main binary executed on Arm64 while resolving candidate version 1.72.9.
